texto: Life becomes the way it is lived
autor: and man may live the way he wants to live when he learns to think what he wants to think.
explicacao: Citação de and man may live the way he wants to live when he learns to think what he wants to think. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life becomes the way it is lived” articula reflexao, christian-d-larson, becomes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
